narrative:
Oxford 9 (precinct in Butler County) has 983 registered voters, with 69.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.6 percentage points.
